body:
## Summary
- Require exact `true` for ad suppression and unlimited mock-exam access gates.
- Keep mock-exam access read failures fail-closed unless `unlimitedMockExams === true`.
- Add runtime regression coverage for malformed entitlement snapshots and repair the ad-placement validator mirror used by the focused gate.

## Validation
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test scripts/monetization.test.js tests/content-mock-exam-runtime-parity.test.js tests/content-ad-placement-route-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "strict boolean|adsDisabled|unlimitedMockExams|getMockExamAccessDecision|shouldShowAd|read failure|rewarded extra exam|home banner"`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check HEAD^..HEAD`
title: monetization: require strict boolean entitlement gates
